title: Academic Context 3
instructions: Complete each sentence with the correct word.

sentences.text: Many modern medicines are _____ from natural plant compounds.
The uneven _____ of resources led to significant economic disparities.
The country experienced rapid _____ growth during the industrial revolution.
Protecting the natural _____ is a responsibility we all share.
The _____ procedure for handling complaints has been in use for decades.
The initial _____ of the project's cost proved to be significantly too low.
There is compelling _____ that climate change is accelerating.
The company plans to _____ its products to new international markets.
